title: Tao Te Ching 18
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 18 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 18 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: When the great Tao is abandoned, benevolence and righteousness appear. When wisdom and cleverness emerge, there is great hypocrisy.
